_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: Both single agent selumetinib and the combination of VS-4718 plus selumetinib significantly decreased DRG volume compared to VS-4718 and the vehicle control
details: Single agent selumetinib significantly decreased DRG volume compared to VS-4718 and vehicle control
